creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 255024
dmesg 14.1p5 arm64 in oracle clowd

per list I also see this on latest weekly 15.0-CURRENT snapshots, built in freebsd cluster.
https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/tree/release/tools/oracle.conf#n49

This is what's in loader.conf:

autoboot_delay="5"
beastie_disable="YES"
boot_serial="YES"
loader_logo="none"
cryptodev_load="YES"
opensolaris_load="YES"
xz_load="YES"
zfs_load="YES"
